subject: chemistry
title: 18M.1.HL.TZ1.26
question_html:
Which statements are correct?

        I. Lewis bases can act as nucleophiles.

        II. Electrophiles are Lewis acids.

        III. Lewis acids are electron pair acceptors.

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III
